center.name: 彭巴草原
center.summary: 彭巴草原是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联10种鸟类，包括棕头草雁、Magellanic snipe、Maguari stork等10种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Pampas and north to the Paraguayan border and Rio Grande do Sul, where its natural habitats are swamps and pastureland

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It reaches Uruguay during the non-breeding season. It inhabits a variety of damp to wet landscapes including pampas, peat bogs, flooded steppe, tussock grasslands, the edges of marshes, and sometimes swampy woods

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Colonial Waterbirds 10: 181-202. and the Pampas of Argentina. It occurs seasonally and is common in the Pantanal of Argentina. Large numbers migrate to the Pantanal in the wet season, probably from the Parana Basin and Rio Grand do Sul.Antas PTZ

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It nominally inhabits grasslands of the Pampas but is "now found almost entirely in agricultural fields!" (emphasis in original)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits the Gran Chaco, Pampas, and Argentine Espinal ecoregions, where it occurs in woodlands, scrublands, thorn forest, and savanna

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In its non-breeding range it inhabits the Chaco, the Argentine Espinal, Pampas grasslands, and lowland moist forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This swallow is native to Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Paraguay, Peru, and Uruguay. It inhabits open and semi-open country near water, the edge of woodland, and human settlements. It also occurs in dry savannas, degraded former forest, and both subtropical and tropical seasonally flooded grassland. It is additionally known to occur in the pampas of Argentina and Uruguay

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Swainson's hawks mostly winter on the pampas of South America in Argentina, Uruguay, and southern Brazil. The populations of Swainson's hawks breeding in California's Central Valley also winter in western Mexico and central America. The Swainson's hawk is the second longest migrant of any North American raptor, after arctic nesting Peregrine falcons

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This swallow can be found in open and mostly open tropical and subtropical areas, especially near small bodies of water, forest clearings near streams, and in pampas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits open landscapes such as meadows, Pampas wetlands, the borders of ponds, and coastal grasslands
